lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zhǎo dào fángzi le ma?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 还没有。虽然看了很多，但是都太贵了。
lines.pinyin: Hái méiyǒu. Suīrán kàn le hěn duō, dànshì dōu tài guì le.
lines.english: Not yet. Although I've looked at many, they're all too expensive.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 如果你想便宜一点，就住远一点吧。
lines.pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ xiǎng piányi yìdiǎn, jiù zhù yuǎn yìdiǎn ba.
lines.english: If you want cheaper, then live a bit farther away.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对我来说，上班方便比较重要。
lines.pinyin: Duì wǒ lái shuō, shàngbān fāngbiàn bǐjiào zhòngyào.
lines.english: For me, a convenient commute is more important.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那你可以一边找房子一边住我这儿。
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐ kěyǐ yìbiān zhǎo fángzi yìbiān zhù wǒ zhèr.
lines.english: Then you can stay at my place while you keep looking.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de Zhōngwén yuèláiyuè hǎo le!
lines.english: Your Chinese is getting better and better!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢！不过汉字太难了，我连简单的都记不住。
lines.pinyin: Xièxiè! Búguò hànzì tài nán le, wǒ lián jiǎndān de dōu jì bú zhù.
lines.english: Thanks! But characters are too hard, I can't even remember the simple ones.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 除了多写以外，你也可以用手机软件学。
lines.pinyin: Chúle duō xiě yǐwài, nǐ yě kěyǐ yòng shǒujī ruǎnjiàn xué.
lines.english: Besides writing more, you can also use phone apps to study.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好主意！你能不能推荐一个？
lines.pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyi! Nǐ néng bù néng tuījiàn yí gè?
lines.english: Good idea! Can you recommend one?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 当然可以，我把链接发给你。
lines.pinyin: Dāngrán kěyǐ, wǒ bǎ liànjiē fā gěi nǐ.
lines.english: Of course, I'll send you the link.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你今天怎么了？看起来不太高兴。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān zěnme le? Kàn qǐlái bú tài gāoxìng.
lines.english: What happened today? You don't look very happy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 别提了。我的钱包被人偷了。
lines.pinyin: Bié tí le. Wǒ de qiánbāo bèi rén tōu le.
lines.english: Don't even mention it. My wallet was stolen.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nǐ bào jǐng le ma?
lines.english: Really? Did you call the police?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 报了，但是他们说很难找回来。
lines.pinyin: Bào le, dànshì tāmen shuō hěn nán zhǎo huílái.
lines.english: Yes, but they said it would be hard to get it back.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 虽然很倒霉，但是人没事就好。
lines.pinyin: Suīrán hěn dǎoméi, dànshì rén méi shì jiù hǎo.
lines.english: Although it's unlucky, as long as you're OK, that's what matters.
